status.message: Cannot invoke "java.util.UUID.toString()" because the return value of "com.kosign.wetax.domain.pos.POSSaleMaster.getGuid()" is null

notes.analysis: Same NPE as initial audit (sample 12). Valid UUIDv7 ref_id did NOT fix the issue. The server's POSSaleMaster entity has a null GUID field even though the order was accepted by sendOrderInfo 5 seconds earlier. Root cause is server-side: either (a) sendOrderInfo does not populate POSSaleMaster.guid with the client-provided ref_id, (b) there is a processing pipeline delay longer than 5 seconds, or (c) the GUID field is populated by a different mechanism entirely.
